evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Implementing monitoring solutions for infrastructure quality
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: The responsibilities emphasize industrializing complex models, monitoring, and infrastructure quality with no velocity or shipping-speed language present.
evidence.domain_risk: Concevoir et industrialiser des modèles complexes pour la couche sémantique
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: This is pricing data for a major retailer feeding business decisions without explicit regulatory, financial-reporting, or compliance framing, placing it at moderate risk.
evidence.data_team_maturity: Guiding analytics teams in leveraging the insights layer
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: The role guides other analytics teams and industrializes an existing semantic/insights layer at a large established company (Decathlon), indicating a mature data function with specialized sub-teams.
evidence.jd_authorship: Concevoir et industrialiser des modèles complexes pour la couche sémantique
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: The precise framing of industrializing complex semantic layer models for pricing data, plus a specific named tech stack, shows technical specificity from someone who does this job.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Guiding analytics teams in leveraging the insights layer
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The role builds and guides use of the semantic/insights layer for other analytics teams, making the data function itself the primary audience.
evidence.autonomy_level: Concevoir et industrialiser des modèles complexes pour la couche sémantique
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: The role combines designing and industrializing complex models (strategic ownership of a technical domain) with converting stakeholder priorities into data solutions (execution), reflecting genuine mixed autonomy.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: The JD contains no mention of AI tools or AI-consuming infrastructure anywhere in the text.
evidence.testing_framing: Implementing monitoring solutions for infrastructure quality
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Monitoring and infrastructure quality are framed as an owned responsibility area (Operational Excellence) rather than a listed skill, making this a responsibility.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Implementing monitoring solutions for infrastructure quality
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Operational excellence and monitoring are a named responsibility pillar, reflecting concern about pipeline/infrastructure reliability rather than full compliance or regulatory framing.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Concevoir et industrialiser des modèles complexes pour la couche sémantique
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Industrializing existing complex models for an established semantic layer at a mature retailer is scaling and hardening existing infrastructure, not a from-scratch build.
evidence.loss_aversion: Implementing monitoring solutions for infrastructure quality — reflects concern about pipeline/data infrastructure reliability rather than compliance.
